narrative:
Precinct Zanesville 5-A (precinct in Muskingum County) has 872 registered voters, with 57.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.5%, a modest Republican lean of 5.8 percentage points.
